song: 06 - Oh Bess, Oh Where's My Bess
comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Eb major, Andantino con molto calore. Porgy's aria. No chord-row labels in published score -- spurious pipeline chords wiped. Many gap measures where pipeline lost lyrics. Unfixable note-loss gaps: m6 (tell me), m8 (rest), m28 (rest), m30 (rest), m57 (rest), m64 (rest). Held/tied notes with no new syllable documented as empty lyrics_v1.

5.comment: Pipeline read 'some- bod- tell' (3 notes). Published: 'some-bod-y' on 3 notes; 'tell me' was in m6 where pipeline lost notes entirely.

7.comment: Pipeline read 'where?-' with trailing hyphen. Published: 'where?' (no continuation syllable).

16.comment: Pipeline read 'mare' with spurious Ab dominant chord. Published: held 'Bess?' tied from m15, no new syllable. No chords in score.

18.comment: Pipeline had 1 note with 0 lyrics. Published: 'Oh' (start of 'Oh Lawd').

19.comment: Pipeline had 1 note with 0 lyrics. Published: held tied note continuation. No new syllable.

20.comment: Pipeline had 1 note with 0 lyrics. Published: 'Lawd,'.

21.comment: Pipeline had 1 note with 0 lyrics. Published: held tied 'Lawd'. No new syllable.

22.comment: Pipeline had 1 note, 0 lyrics, spurious Ab minor chord. Published: 'My' (pickup to 'My Bess!'). No chords in score.

23.comment: Pipeline read only 'I' for 2 notes. Published: 'Bess!' on first note, 'I' on second.

26.comment: Pipeline had 1 note, 0 lyrics. Published: 'Wid' (start of 'Wid-out her I can't go on').

27.comment: Pipeline read 'out her ee'. Published: 'out her I' (3 notes).

34.comment: Pipeline read 'till' for 2 notes. Published: first note is held 'gone', second note is 'till'.

35.comment: Pipeline read 'to' for 2 notes. Published: 'I got' (2 separate syllables on 2 notes).

37.comment: Pipeline had 2 notes, 0 lyrics. Published: held 'home' then 'to' pickup.

39.comment: Pipeline read 'Won't' for 2 notes. Published: first note is held 'face.' from m38, second is 'Won't' pickup.

43.comment: Pipeline had 2 notes, 0 lyrics. Published: held 'Bess?' then 'I' pickup.

44.comment: Pipeline had 3 notes, 0 lyrics. Published: 'want her so,' (3 syllables on 3 notes).

45.comment: Pipeline read 'my' for 2 notes. Published: held 'so' then 'my' on second note.

47.comment: Pipeline read 'ae My'. Published: held 'gal,' then 'My' pickup. 'ae' is OCR garbage.

49.comment: Pipeline had 1 note, 0 lyrics. Published: held tied 'Bess,'. No new syllable.

51.comment: Pipeline read 'Oh' for 2 notes. Published: held 'she' then 'Oh' pickup.

52.comment: Pipeline had 2 notes, 0 lyrics. Published: 'Gawd,' and 'in' (2 notes).

53.comment: Pipeline had 2 notes, 0 lyrics. Published: 'yo'' and 'big' (2 notes).

55.comment: Pipeline had 1 note, 0 lyrics. Published: 'please' (held Heav'n then 'please' pickup).

59.comment: Pipeline had 1 note, 0 lyrics. Published: held 'go,' tied. No new syllable.

60.comment: Pipeline read 'give me strength,' for 3 notes. Published: 'Oh give me de strength,' where 'Oh' is in m59 pickup area. 3 notes in m60: best fit is 'give me de' with 'strength,' moving to m61.

63.comment: Pipeline had 1 note, 0 lyrics. Published: held 'way!' tied. No new syllable.
